MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lavon Granger. There being no appearance by either party, the Court ordered the matter off settlement conference and the trial date is vacated.
